setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added comprehensive tests for UnitTest1 class, covering constructor and Test1() method with basic validation
fileReports.recommendations: Consider adding more meaningful logic to Test1() method to enable more substantive testing
fileReports.note: Current implementation is minimal and requires additional business logic to create more meaningful tests

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more robust error handling in writeMessage method
Implement logging instead of Console.WriteLine for better testability
Add more detailed exception handling in Dispose method
fileReports.note: These tests provide basic coverage but actual Kafka interactions would require more sophisticated mocking

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed logging in exception handling paths
Implement more granular error handling in readMessage method
Add configuration options for timeout and retry mechanisms
keyImprovements: Null config and topic name handling
fileReports.note: Tests use mocking to simulate Kafka consumer behavior without actual Kafka infrastructure

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering property initialization, status assignment, and edge cases with 8 test methods
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for business rules
Add XML documentation comments to clarify model constraints
keyImprovements: Covered default and custom initialization scenarios
fileReports.note: Tests focus on model validation and basic behavior without external dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering various scenarios including valid order processing, model validation, serialization, and error handling
recommendations: Add more robust input validation in the controller
Consider adding logging for better traceability
Implement more detailed error handling for producer wrapper
fileReports.note: Tests require ProducerWrapper and OrderRequest to be properly defined in the project
